$comment: Headline template bank for the career news feed (docs/dev/career-sim.md, News/headlines). Keys are 'journalPhase|cause'; each key holds era-flavored variant lists selected deterministically via the 'headlines' stream, with 'default' as the fallback era. Tokens: {player} {team} {race} {position} {year} for race results; {driver} {year} for retirement items; {champion} {year} for the season digest. 1960s copy is written in period wire-report/telegram voice. Parsed by Companion.Core.Career.HeadlineBank.

1960s: {player} MASTERS {race} — {team} TOASTS FAMOUS VICTORY
VICTORY WIRE: {player} first past the flag at {race}
{player} takes {race} in commanding style for {team}
CHEQUERED FLAG — {player} wins {race}, crowds salute new hero
{race} falls to {player}; {team} garage in jubilation
TELEGRAM FROM THE CIRCUIT: {player} WINS. STOP. MAGNIFICENT DRIVE. STOP.
{player} conquers {race} — the {year} season has its talking point
default: {player} delivers a flawless win for {team} at {race}

1960s: {player} on the rostrum at {race} — {position} for {team}
FINE DRIVE: {player} carries {team} to {position} at {race}
{player} splits the front-runners, {position} at {race}
Rostrum champagne for {player} after {position} at {race}
{team} celebrate as {player} claims {position} at {race}
PRESS ROOM NOTES: {player} quick all weekend, rewarded with {position}
{player} in the points at {race} — {position} at the flag
Steady hand: {player} banks championship points at {race}
{team} timesheets show {player} {position} — points in the bag
USEFUL AFTERNOON: {player} scores at {race}
{player} brings the car home {position}; {team} ledger ticks over
Points finish for {player} keeps the {year} campaign moving
GIANT-KILLING: {player} drags the {team} machine to {position} at {race}
{player} defies the odds at {race} — {position} from nowhere
Paddock abuzz: {player} makes the {team} car sing at {race}
{player} punches above the car's weight — {position} at {race}
SCOUTS' NOTEBOOKS OUT: {player} stars at {race}
The drive of the day belongs to {player}, {position} at {race}
OFF-SONG: {player} labours to {position} at {race}
{player} anonymous at {race}; {team} seek answers
A day to forget — {player} only {position} at {race}
{team} puzzled as {player} fades to {position} at {race}
PIT LANE WHISPERS: {player} short of pace at {race}
{player} misses the mark at {race}
HEARTBREAK: {player}'s {team} machine expires at {race}
Mechanical woe ends {player}'s {race} — no fault of the driver
{player} out of {race}; the car cried enough
SMOKE AND SILENCE: {team} failure sidelines {player} at {race}
The machinery betrays {player} at {race}
{player} retires at {race} — {team} spanners out in vain
{player} OFF THE ROAD — {race} ends in the ditch
Moment of madness: {player} throws away {race}
{player} overcooks it at {race}; {team} count the cost
SPIN AND OUT: {player}'s {race} ends in error
{player} shoulders the blame for {race} retirement
Costly slip — {player} out of {race} by his own hand
{player} brings it home {position} at {race} — quiet afternoon
Midfield running for {player} at {race}
{player} completes {race} in {position}; little to report
WORKMANLIKE: {player} {position} at {race}
{player} logs the miles at {race}
No fireworks — {player} {position} at {race}
{driver} HANGS UP THE GOGGLES — an era closes
{driver} announces retirement from grand prix racing
The paddock salutes {driver}, retiring as planned after {year}
{driver} steps down; the record book keeps the rest
FAREWELL TOUR COMPLETE: {driver} retires
{driver} calls time on a storied career
default: End of the road: {driver} steps away

1960s: {driver} bows to the years and parks the car for good
TIME CATCHES ALL: {driver} retires after {year}
{driver} steps aside — the stopwatch was no longer kind
After a fading season, {driver} announces retirement
{driver} quits the cockpit; younger men circle the seat
The long goodbye ends — {driver} retires
{driver} said to be considering his future in the sport
PADDOCK TALK: {driver} weighs retirement
{driver} non-committal on {year} plans — friends sense a decision coming
Whispers at the back of the garage: {driver} may stop
{driver} spotted in long conversation with the team owner — future unclear
Insiders say {driver} is thinking hard about next season
{team} ON THE UP — new backers, new budget for {year}
Sponsors queue at {team}'s door after a fine season
{team} expand the works; the money follows the results
Fresh capital flows into {team}
{team} promoted in the paddock's unwritten order
The garages whisper: {team} are coming good
default: {team} budget grows after a strong season

1960s: LEAN TIMES AT {team} — purse strings tighten for {year}
{team} lose backers after a bruising season
Cutbacks at {team}; the transporter grows emptier
{team} slide down the paddock's pecking order
Creditors' letters pile up at {team}
The money men lose faith in {team}
default: {team} budget shrinks after a poor season

1960s: {champion} IS CHAMPION OF THE WORLD — the {year} season enters the books
THE {year} CHAMPIONSHIP FALLS TO {champion}; season closed
{champion} crowned as {year} concludes — winter of rumours begins
Final flag of {year}: {champion} takes the laurels
SEASON REVIEW WIRE: {champion} champion; garages already building for next year
{year} belongs to {champion}. The rest is for the history men.
Champagne for {champion} — the {year} title is settled
default: The {year} season closes with {champion} on top
